data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

OneConnect Financial Technology Co Ltd ( (HK:6638) ) has provided an announcement.

OneConnect Financial Technology Co., Ltd. has announced a proposal for privatization through a scheme of arrangement, which includes the withdrawal of its listing from the Stock Exchange and the NYSE. This move, part of a ‘going private transaction’ under U.S. regulations, involves a series of amendments to the Schedule 13E-3 filed with the SEC, reflecting updates on the effective date, delisting, and cash payments. The privatization is expected to impact the company’s market positioning and stakeholder engagement, as it transitions away from public trading.

More about OneConnect Financial Technology Co Ltd

OneConnect Financial Technology Co., Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the financial technology sector. It provides technology solutions primarily for financial institutions, focusing on enhancing digital transformation and operational efficiency.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$2.4B

The latest announcement is out from PT International Development Corporation Limited ( (HK:0372) ).

PT International Development Corporation Limited announced measures to address a disclaimer of opinion on its financial statements for the year ended 31 March 2024. The company has entered into a memorandum of understanding with Guangxi Linghang International Logistics Company Limited for a potential capital injection into its subsidiary, Guangxi Guangming Warehouse Storage Limited. This potential subscription aims to alleviate liquidity pressures by repaying outstanding debts. Additionally, the company is negotiating with Guilin Bank to resolve issues related to existing bank loans, with expectations of resolution by March 2026.

data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Global Sweeteners Holdings Limited ( (HK:3889) ) has provided an announcement.

Global Corn Group Limited announced the resignation of its CEO, Mr. Wang Hui, effective November 20, 2025, as he plans to focus on other business ventures. The company has decided not to appoint a new CEO until operations at the Jinzhou Production Site resume or a clear business need arises, as the site remains suspended pending loan restructuring negotiations. The Shanghai Production Site continues to operate under its management team. The company’s joint chairmen, Mr. Wang Tieguang and Mr. Kong Zhanpeng, will oversee the restructuring and management of the production sites.

More about Global Sweeteners Holdings Limited

Global Corn Group Limited operates in the sweeteners industry, focusing on the production and management of corn-based products. The company has production sites in Jinzhou and Shanghai, with a market focus on bio-chem technology and food development.

China Merchants Land Limited ( (HK:0978) ) just unveiled an announcement.

China Merchants Land Limited, through its subsidiary Nanjing Zhaoping, has entered into an Equity Transfer Agreement with CITIC Securities to acquire 100% equity interests in a Project Company. This transaction, valued at RMB259,236,960.10, is considered a discloseable transaction under the Hong Kong Listing Rules, as it exceeds 5% but is less than 25% of the applicable percentage ratios.
